_metadata.title: Restrict Guest User Invitations
_metadata.description: Restricts guest invitation permissions so that only admins and users with the Guest Inviter role can invite external guests. Prevents unrestricted guest sprawl.

graphApiCalls.description: Restrict guest invitation to admins and Guest Inviter role only

postDeployment: Assign Guest Inviter role to specific users who need to invite guests
Review existing guest accounts and remove stale ones
